narrative: | Each superhero has been assigned a unique identifier to accurately link their supernatural abilities to their profiles. (Hash: b3524cb074464534) | | As the world of heroes expands, maintaining precise records becomes essential to manage their growing numbers. | | The superhero possesses a unique identifier for their supernatural ability. (Hash: 3e72f44e01dd4fa0) | | This system of identification ensures that each hero's distinct powers are documented and easily accessible. |
